scripts.lint: pnpm --if-present --recursive lint && cd apps/api && uv run ruff check src tests
scripts.test: pnpm --if-present --recursive test && cd apps/api && uv run pytest
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --if-present --recursive typecheck && cd apps/api && uv run mypy src
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
